items.title: Green notification for tropical cyclone JANGMI-26. Population affected by Category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 45698 .
items.body: From 27/05/2026 to 28/05/2026, a Tropical Depression (maximum wind speed of 176 km/h) JANGMI-26 was active in NWPacific. The cyclone affects these countries: Japan (vulnerability Low). Estimated population affected by category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 45698 .
items.details: From 27/05/2026 to 28/05/2026, a Tropical Depression (maximum wind speed of 176 km/h) JANGMI-26 was active in NWPacific. The cyclone affects these countries: Japan (vulnerability Low). Estimated population affected by category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 45698 .
